ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., stock prices, trading volumes) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current version of the dataset */,
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data quality metrics */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_quality_id") REFERENCES data_quality ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_dataset_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_frequency FOREIGN KEY ("frequency") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., API, data feed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the source, if applicable */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the frequency (e.g., minutes, days) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the frequency (e.g., UTC, EST) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the stock price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount, if applicable */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "trading_volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the trading volume belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading volume */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "adjusted_volume" INTEGER /* Adjusted trading volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source the data feed belongs to */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the data feed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data feed */,
  "feed_url" TEXT /* URL of the data feed */,
  "feed_format" TEXT /* Format of the data feed (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "feed_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data feed (e.g., real-time, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permission is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the quality metric belongs to */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., accuracy, completeness) */,
  "quality_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the quality metric */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the quality issue is critical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., API, data feed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the source, if applicable */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_name" TEXT /* Name of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_types_metadata_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the issue belongs to */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., missing values, outliers) */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the issue */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_issues_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_issues_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the validation rule belongs to */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "validation_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the validation rule is active */,
  "last_run" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last run of the validation rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source the contact belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the contact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_contacts_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role is assigned to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
